# Git Commit Reference

## Conventional Commits Format
```
<type>(<scope>): <description>

<body>

<footer>
```

## Types
- `feat:` — new feature
- `fix:` — bug fix
- `docs:` — documentation
- `refactor:` — code restructuring
- `test:` — adding/fixing tests
- `chore:` — maintenance tasks

## Common Workflows
```bash
# Interactive commit
git add -p
git commit

# Amend last commit
git commit --amend

# Sign-off
git commit -s
```
